key.name: active-provider
key.description: One of: openai, anthropic, gemini, ollama

key.name: tones
key.default: '[ {"name": "Concise", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text to be as concise as possible without losing meaning. Cut filler words. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": true}, {"name": "Direct", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text to be blunt and direct. No hedging, no filler. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": true}, {"name": "Flirty", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text in a flirty, charming tone. Keep it tasteful and fun. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": true}, {"name": "Formal", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text in a formal, professional tone. Preserve the meaning exactly. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": true}, {"name": "Friendly", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text in a warm, approachable, and conversational tone. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": false}, {"name": "Playful", "system_prompt": "Rewrite the following text in a light, playful, and friendly tone. Keep it clear. Return only the rewritten text.", "enabled": false} ]'
key.description: Each entry: {name: string, system_prompt: string, enabled: bool}

key.name: dismiss-on-focus-out
key.summary: Dismiss window when focus is lost

key.name: keep-text-on-dismiss
key.summary: Keep input text when window is dismissed
key.description: When false (default), input and diff are cleared each time the window is hidden.

key.name: shortcut-prompted
key.summary: Whether the keyboard shortcut setup dialog has been shown
key.description: Set to true after the first-run shortcut prompt is shown, so it is never repeated.

key.name: stt-enabled
key.description: When true, the mic button is shown in the overlay window. The Speech preferences page is always visible.

key.name: whisper-local-model-path
key.summary: Path to local whisper.cpp model file (.bin)
